## Project Overview
Railway Complaint Management System with:
- Multi-modal input processing (text, image, audio, video)
- ML pipeline for classification, priority, and escalation
- Optional sentiment analysis plug-in
- Computer vision for visual content analysis
- REST API backend with FastAPI
- Modern web and mobile interfaces

## Development Progress
Building step-by-step with testing after each module.
